name: Customer Export Wizard
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers can be exported into a CSV (comma separated values) file so that you can manually report or import into a third party system. You can also export customer lists to make changes, and then import back into Neto. There's 2 ways to export your customer details:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Simple Export"}], "data-id": "simple-export"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The simple export is best used only for reporting, as fields can't be customised as much and filters are limited. Third party applications will likely have a specific format required in which case the complex export is better suited."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the simple export:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View customers & prospects", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the filters to display the customers you want exported."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the arrow next to the "}, {"text": "Export", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the top of the page, and choose "}, {"text": "Export current results", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can also use the "}, {"text": "Export all customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " to get a complete file containing every customer in your Neto account."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The CSV file of your customers will be created and downloaded to your computer automatically."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Complex Export"}], "data-id": "complex-export"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The complex export wizard gives you a lot more control over the fields that are exported, filters, and allows you to set up schedules to export on a regular basis. To use the complex export wizard:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Export data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " radio button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex export", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and choose the "}, {"text": "Start Data Export Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": " option."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a name for your file and click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You now need to choose which customer fields you want to export. Click the "}, {"text": "Add New Field To File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and choose the fields from the drop down menus."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You need to select a field type first (customer details or sales summary) and then choose the field name."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Be sure to include the "}, {"text": "Customer Details", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Username", "bold": true}, {"text": " as this is used as the unique identifier for your customers."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat the previous step and add all the fields you need in your file. When complete, click "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can change the column header for each field on the right hand side of the page. This is useful if you export to a third party system that has specific field name requirements."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now determine which customers are included in the file by selecting filters."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, enter a number in the balance from field to see customers who owe money."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you've finished selecting your filters click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Send Export File To", "bold": true}, {"text": " field, select how you want to receive your sales order export file."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Choose Local URL to save the file in your site assets, so it can be downloaded when ready. You'll be shown a URL where it can be downloaded."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Export Method"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Steps"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Email"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Send the file as an attachment on an email."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Email Address", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "FTP"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Save the file on another server."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter the server "}, {"text": "FTP Location", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "FTP Username", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "FTP Password", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "External URL"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Post the file to another server (advanced option)."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "External URL", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "FTP Username", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "FTP Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " and any other required fields."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Local URL"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Save the file to a folder on your site."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Folder Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " (or leave blank for the default location)."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-b020203c"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Make sure you add any required details (e.g. email address, FTP username/password) depending on your selection."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the checkbox if you want to save the export settings (name, fields, filters etc) so that you can run the export again later. If you do, enter a template name and optionally select an automated export schedule."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Export Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The export process will be queued to run, create the file, and deliver it to your chosen location."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click on the export process ID to view a page with the status of your export. Click the "}, {"text": "Run Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on this page to start the process immediately."}]}], "appearance": "info"}]
